questions.hindi: वह शायद वहाँ गया होगा।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + may have + past participle (uncertain possibility about the past)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "He may have gone there."

questions.hindi: शायद उसने यह किताब पढ़ी होगी।
